summary.intent: Fix PR review comments on the copilot-enterprise branch, addressing security and correctness issues in the GitHub Copilot provider.
summary.outcome: Applied five fixes: SSRF validation on proxy_ep, Secret<String> wrapping for CopilotAuth.token, guard order swap in complete(), trailing-buffer event handling, and account_id comment style. All 32 tests pass and changes were pushed.

repo: The codebase uses the `secrecy` crate for sensitive values — `Secret<String>` with `.expose_secret()` is the expected pattern for tokens in HTTP headers.
The `copilot_auth_from_parts` function is the central constructor for `CopilotAuth` and is the right place to enforce invariants like SSRF validation on proxy_ep.

Responses API methods (`complete_responses`, `stream_responses_api`) must use `get_copilot_auth()` with `auth.base_url`/`auth.token` for enterprise routing — hardcoded `COPILOT_API_BASE` breaks enterprise.
PR review style uses `NOTE:` prefix for explanatory comments on repurposed fields.

code.finding: Test constructions of CopilotAuth directly — required updating to wrap token in Secret::new() after the Secret<String> migration.
collect_streamed_completion had a match arm silently dropping Events and Done variants — trailing-buffer events were being discarded.

workflow: Iterative PR comment fixing: fetch comments, read relevant code sections, apply fixes, run tests, commit and push in one session.
Adding a test for newly introduced SSRF validation immediately after implementing it — keeping test count in sync with new invariants.

friction: Multiple rounds of PR comments required — some issues (enterprise routing in Responses API methods) were discovered as bonus fixes during the second round, suggesting incomplete initial review coverage.
Needed multiple targeted reads of the same large file (github_copilot.rs) to locate all affected sites for the Secret<String> migration.
open_items: Verify that SSRF validation on proxy_ep covers all enterprise proxy injection paths, not just the one in copilot_auth_from_parts.
Check whether complete_responses and stream_responses_api have test coverage for enterprise routing after the base_url fix.
